history.note: Full language toggle coverage across all screens — screen 1 search, screen 2 loading steps, and all hardcoded strings in screen 3 render functions now respond to ES/EN toggle
Redesign mascot SVG with turbulence fur filter, large lavender eyes with prominent highlights, and better proportions matching Humand mascot
Replace loading orbit animation with Humand mascot SVG wearing reading glasses and typing on a laptop
Add Google Meet join button at top of action checklist with Meet branding
Remove box-shadows from all containers and cards, keep only on floating elements (drawer, dropdowns, toast)
Fix role filter scoping, fix duplicate toggleAction conflict breaking checkboxes, add visual containers per section in analysis drawer and simplify signals to text+chip
Fix voseo to neutral Spanish throughout and fix language toggle to fully re-render all content
Move role questions to main stakeholders drawer, remove from edit drawer, add back arrow to edit drawer
Add back arrow to Tech Stack drawer to return to company detail drawer
Switch company logo source from discontinued Clearbit API to Google Favicon Service
Stage-specific action checklists per pipeline step and role-based question filter chips for all stages
Enrich módulos with solutions JSON, redesign sales materials as 4 cards with editable email drawer, clean risk/signals style
Show company logo from Clearbit in header strip with fallback to colored initials avatar
Redesign company header strip: add Amount (USD/año calculated from headcount), Headcount, Industry stats, SMB/Enterprise/Large Enterprise type pill, and AE avatar with name
Swap columns: Action Plan left (grey background) and Context right (white sidebar with left border); remove outer stage-body padding so backgrounds fill edge to edge
Add company name to URL param; default stage to Lead; add section titles with descriptions to Context and Action Plan columns; fix 40/60 column split

Redesign results layout: Context column (40%) with 3 expandable cards (Company, Stakeholders, Analysis) and Action Plan column (60%) with tabs (Actions checklist, Sales Materials with email templates, Meeting Toolkit with stage-aware agenda)
Replace navigable stepper with fixed stage progress bar showing current stage + objective; add Mover deal dropdown CTA to change stage
Make right side panel 25% of screen width with more internal padding
Redesign stage detail layout: floating white cards on grey background, sticky wizard nav card, panels as individual cards, tabbed side panel (Objetivo / Stakeholders / Notas)
Replace tech stack pills with square logo cards (grid layout with name + category); widen stage-body to full width with 40px margins
Update wizard nav to Hugo style: plain text items, rounded grey pill on selected, no left-border, border-left on content instead; stage-main fills available height
Replace collapsible cards with left wizard nav + section panels; remove nueva búsqueda button (logo navigates home)
Redesign tech stack cards to Hugo horizontal style: grey circular avatar with initial, status label, tool name + description, category chip and trash icon on right
Align UI to Hugo design system: updated primary blue, rounded buttons and inputs, left-accent info banners, outlined chips, cleaner focus states
Fix recursos drawer: render directly into drawer body to avoid duplicate IDs with hidden panel, fix swResTab to scope queries to container
Add objection handling playbook to Lead stage with keyword search, common objections chips, and no-fit signals; slim down stage content per GAVIN priorities
Replace Clearbit with Simple Icons CDN for reliable tool logos across tech stack cards and search dropdown
Fix JS syntax error that blocked chip navigation — wire renderLegacyPanels into render()

Rediseño completo de pantalla de resultados: wizard por etapa de pipeline, company strip, stepper horizontal, cards por etapa, drawer para tech stack editable con buscador y módulos Humand, drawer para stakeholders, recursos y deal strategy
Stage-aware content (questions, meeting, pitch), notes sidebar, question responses, editable participants, ES/EN toggle, logo as home
Apply Hugo design system tokens: Roboto font, updated color palette, DS shadows and border radius
Add Apollo API integration, visual tech stack cards with logos and Humand module mapping, and editable notes tab with localStorage persistence
Initial release — B2B Intelligence tool with company profiles, tech stack analysis, pitch recommendations and resources
